name: Market Readiness Assistance
summary: Supports overseas market entry and business development activities.
notes: Best suited for companies entering a new overseas market.
Often relevant when the company has a concrete target market.

name: Enterprise Development Grant - Automation
summary: Supports projects that improve productivity through process redesign and automation.
notes: Best suited for businesses trying to reduce manual work or improve throughput.
Can overlap with broader operational transformation projects.

name: Enterprise Development Grant - New Product Development
summary: Supports the development and commercialization of new products or solutions.
notes: Best suited for companies building something materially new.
Not ideal for minor feature upgrades or routine engineering work.

name: Career Conversion Programme
summary: Supports structured reskilling of new or existing employees into redesigned roles.
notes: Most relevant when there is a clearly redesigned role and a structured training plan.
Can apply to either new hires or existing employees, depending on the programme design.

name: Company Training Committee Grant
summary: Supports workforce transformation tied to business transformation and employee outcomes.
notes: Usually more suitable for larger transformation projects with meaningful employee impact.
Less suitable for very small companies.

name: Digital Leaders Programme
summary: Supports companies building a digital team and executing substantial digital transformation initiatives.
notes: Most relevant when the company is building real digital capability rather than buying only off-the-shelf software.
Better fit for businesses with clear digital initiatives.

name: Enterprise Development Grant - Standards Adoption
summary: Supports adoption of recognised standards or certifications to improve capability and market readiness.
notes: Relevant when certification is needed to sell into regulated markets or meet partner requirements.
Less relevant if the business problem is mainly hiring or automation.

name: Enterprise Innovation Scheme
summary: Provides enhanced support for qualifying innovation and capability development activities.
notes: Broadly relevant for companies investing in innovation capability.
May be less direct than a grant tied to a specific transformation project.
